message:
test(fcp-core): pin NodeId roundtrip + equality (jsylc)

Add crates/fcp-core/tests/node_id_roundtrip.rs covering both NodeId
types in fcp-core. 15/15 tests pass.

quorum::NodeId (String-backed, no FromStr): Display→new round-trip,
equality across String/&str/clone, distinct-input distinctness, Ord
is string-lex (the ordering sort_node_signatures and SignatureSet
rely on), HashMap key correctness.

TailscaleNodeId (Arc<str>, validating, no Display): as_str→FromStr
round-trip, equality across try_new/try_from/from_str/clone,
distinct-input distinctness, validation rejects empty/uppercase/
non-ASCII/whitespace, HashMap key correctness.

Cross-type sanity test pins divergent validation contracts: quorum
NodeId accepts "" and "UPPER" while TailscaleNodeId rejects both —
any refactor unifying the two must resolve which validator wins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
